name: Biotechnica Hotel Enhanced ( with Apartment )
description: After the "Mysterious" passing of Joanne Koch, the Biotechnica Hotel has Enhanced their entire Hotel with Better Visibility and even started letting Clients back to rent a room again ! BIOTECHNICA WELCOMES YOU BACK and even invites you to Joanne's old room! The NEW AV Landing Pad added on the Roof will let Clients come and go as they please !
